title: Phase 12B: Command center - page, today overview, exceptions, department health
description: Build the command center: main page, today overview panel with live KPIs, top exceptions panel, department health blocks, quick actions panel, live activity feed via Socket.io, shift handoff summary, and SLA monitor.
steps: Create src/components/command-center/today-overview.tsx with live KPIs (order counts, truck counts, pickup queue, delayed stops, COD due)
Create src/components/command-center/top-exceptions.tsx with top exceptions panel sorted by severity/SLA
Create src/components/command-center/department-health.tsx with health blocks for dispatch, yard, delivery, collections, purchasing, pricing
Create src/components/command-center/quick-actions.tsx with quick action buttons (create order, dispatch truck, etc.)
Create src/components/command-center/activity-feed.tsx with live activity feed via Socket.io
Create src/components/command-center/shift-handoff.tsx with shift handoff summary generator
